existing_analysis.generated_baseline_summary: Raver was retained by BJP in 2024. BJP vote share changed by -6.1 points and INC vote share changed by -29.2 points compared with 2019. The 2024 margin was 23.2%. This is a descriptive election profile, not a causal explanation.
existing_analysis.generated_electoral_movement: Available data indicates Raver was retained by BJP in 2024. BJP vote share changed by -6.1 percentage points versus 2019. INC vote share changed by -29.2 percentage points versus 2019. The winning margin moved from 30.7% in 2019 to 23.2% in 2024. Turnout changed by -2.3 percentage points between 2019 and 2024. This section describes observed election movement only and is not a causal explanation.
existing_analysis.generated_demographic_context: Available NFHS-linked indicators may suggest a relatively urban-linked profile (urban share about 64.3%). Electricity/Lpg/Mobile Phone/Bank Account access indicators are available for this seat. Available data indicates relatively high district-linked demographic coverage for this seat.
existing_analysis.generated_district_context: District mapping uses: THANE→Thane. NFHS-5 coverage share is about 100.0%. Change-indicator coverage share is about 100.0%. Change quality flag: low.
existing_analysis.generated_what_to_watch: Track future election results and any improvements in district-linked demographic coverage.
existing_analysis.final_summary: Raver was retained by BJP in 2024. BJP vote share changed by -6.1 points and INC vote share changed by -29.2 points compared with 2019. The 2024 margin was 23.2%. This is a descriptive election profile, not a causal explanation.
existing_analysis.final_electoral_movement: Available data indicates Raver was retained by BJP in 2024. BJP vote share changed by -6.1 percentage points versus 2019. INC vote share changed by -29.2 percentage points versus 2019. The winning margin moved from 30.7% in 2019 to 23.2% in 2024. Turnout changed by -2.3 percentage points between 2019 and 2024. This section describes observed election movement only and is not a causal explanation.
existing_analysis.final_what_to_watch: Track future election results and any improvements in district-linked demographic coverage.

writing_prompts.what_happened_prompt: Describe observed 2019→2024 election movement for Raver, Maharashtra using winner, vote-share, margin, and turnout fields only.
writing_prompts.why_it_mattered_prompt: Explain why Raver may be analytically useful using priority reason (top_inc_loss), contest closeness, swings, and state context.
writing_prompts.factors_prompt: List only cautious factors such as candidate profile, alliance arithmetic, state-level swing, turnout movement, or limited demographic coverage.
writing_prompts.demographic_prompt: Summarise available NFHS-linked indicators and district mapping. If unavailable, state that the profile remains election-only.
writing_prompts.what_to_watch_prompt: Use forward-looking but non-predictive language about seat stability, swing consolidation, and coverage improvements.
writing_prompts.caveat_prompt: State that local causal explanations require further source review.
